title: Mace Recycler
description: Breaking a mace drops the heavy core inside!
body:
## About

Inspired by [this reddit thread](https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/1l1456f/breaking_a_mace_should_leave_the_player_with_a/) by u/S0ulja-boy this is a mod that does a very simple, but quality of life task! Breaking a mace will drop the heavy core inside, allowing it to be reused in future maces due to how rare it is.

## Future
- Suggest more ideas on the discord!
- Possibly configurable drop rates
